implementation: Build complex views through view composition
Use @Binding to pass state down for two-way binding
Use @ObservedObject when parent owns the object
Use VStack HStack ZStack for layout
Use LazyVStack LazyHStack for large lists
Modifier order matters - apply in logical sequence
Use withAnimation for animated state changes
Use Color from asset catalog for theming
Use SF Symbols for consistent icons
Use .task for async operations on view appear
Use Form for settings and input screens
